cards.basicText: Choose an opponent with a revealed card. Deal damage to their hero equal to the BOOST value of the revealed card. Then, return the card to the opponents hand.
cards.title: The fear of the lord

cards.basicText:
Look at an opponent's hand and reveal one of their cards.
Gain an action.
cards.title: solomon's prayer

cards.immediateText: If the opponent played a versatile card, ignore it's value. Otherwise, cancel all effects on the opponent's card.
cards.title: The blessing

cards.duringText: You may change the printed value of the opponent's card to its BOOST value. (If a card does not have a BOOST value, it is treated as 0.)
cards.title: Love is stronger than death

cards.duringText: The opponent may reveal a random card from their hand. If they do not, the value of this card is 6.
cards.title: nothing new under the sun

cards.duringText: You may return any number of revealed cards to your opponent's hand. Add +2 to the value of this card for every card returned.
cards.title: intelligent design

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, the opponent must reveal 2 random cards instead of 1.
cards.title: Trust in the lord

cards.immediateText: Cancel all effects on your opponent's card.
cards.title: Feint

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, choose one of the fighters in the combat and move them up to 2 spaces.
cards.title: Skirmish

cards.duringText: If the opposing fighter has at least 1 revealed card, the value of this card is 5.
cards.title: Proverbial wisdom

cards.duringText: If the opponent has a revealed card, add the BOOST value of that card to the value of this card.
cards.title: Knowledge applied

cards.basicText:
Choose an opponent with a revealed card and choose one of the following effects: 
 - Recover health equal to the BOOST value of that card
 - Draw an amount of cards equal to the BOOST value of that card
cards.title: All is vanity

hero.name: King Solomon
hero.specialAbility: Whenever Solomon wins a combat, the opponent must reveal 1 random card in their hand.

ruleCards.content:
A revealed card is a face up card from the opponents hand that sits in front of them.  Revealed cards are considered to be part of that player's hand and must be played face up when attacking/defending.


Revealed cards cannot be chosen to discard for the purposes of maintaining hand limit or to fulfill effects of their cards or BOOSTING.
ruleCards.title: Revealed cards

sidekick.quote: "Give therefore thy servant an understanding heart to judge thy people, that I may discern between good and bad" - King Solomon

name: King Solomon
note:
King Solomon is the wisest man to have ever lived! The challenge I faced, was turning wisdom into a mechanic that worked within UnMatched. And so, with great wisdom, comes great understanding! King Solomon now has the ability to cause a player to reveal a card in their hand whenever he is victorious in combat. Now that Solomon has this additional knowledge, he can use it against his opponent, causing them to take damage from their own card, or even using those revealed cards to boost his own hand and health. The mechanic works great and I'd love to hear your thoughts on the deck, I've had a ton of fun with it so far!
Clarifications: 
1. An opponent may have multiple revealed cards (no limit).
2. Whenever an opponent does have multiple revealed cards, Solomon may choose which one he is using for card effects/scheme fulfillment.
3. Whenever Solomon does use an opponent's revealed card, that card remains revealed, unless a card effect says otherwise.
